mapper.sql: select r.issue_id, r.issue_code, r.issue_title, r.source_type, r.source_warning_id, r.dept_id, r.warning_level, r.region_name, r.responsible_unit_name, r.responsible_person, r.supervisor_name, r.deadline, r.issue_status, r.indicator_id, r.indicator_name, r.current_value, r.threshold_value, r.issue_description, r.rectification_result, r.review_opinion, r.attachment_url, r.dispatch_time, r.submit_time, r.review_time, r.archive_time, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark from nc_rectification_issue r
mapper.select: where source_warning_id = #{sourceWarningId} and del_flag = '0' and issue_status not in ('closed', 'archived') order by issue_id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into nc_rectification_issue (issue_code, issue_title, source_type, source_warning_id, dept_id, warning_level, region_name, responsible_unit_name, responsible_person, supervisor_name, deadline, issue_status, indicator_id, indicator_name, current_value, threshold_value, issue_description, rectification_result, review_opinion, attachment_url, create_by, create_time, remark) values (coalesce(#{issueCode}, 'ISS-' || to_char(current_timestamp, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')), #{issueTitle}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceWarningId}, #{deptId}, #{warningLevel}, #{regionName}, #{responsibleUnitName}, #{responsiblePerson}, #{supervisorName}, #{deadline}, #{issueStatus}, #{indicatorId}, #{indicatorName}, #{currentValue}, #{thresholdValue}, #{issueDescription}, #{rectificationResult}, #{reviewOpinion}, #{attachmentUrl}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update:
update nc_rectification_issue
issue_title = #{issueTitle}, source_type = #{sourceType}, source_warning_id = #{sourceWarningId}, warning_level = #{warningLevel}, region_name = #{regionName}, responsible_unit_name = #{responsibleUnitName}, responsible_person = #{responsiblePerson}, supervisor_name = #{supervisorName}, deadline = #{deadline}, indicator_id = #{indicatorId}, indicator_name = #{indicatorName}, current_value = #{currentValue}, threshold_value = #{thresholdValue}, issue_description = #{issueDescription}, rectification_result = #{rectificationResult}, review_opinion = #{reviewOpinion}, attachment_url = #{attachmentUrl}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark},
where issue_id = #{issueId} and del_flag = '0'

update nc_rectification_issue
issue_status = #{issueStatus}, responsible_unit_name = #{responsibleUnitName}, responsible_person = #{responsiblePerson}, supervisor_name = #{supervisorName}, deadline = #{deadline}, rectification_result = #{rectificationResult}, review_opinion = #{reviewOpinion}, attachment_url = #{attachmentUrl}, dispatch_time = #{dispatchTime}, submit_time = #{submitTime}, review_time = #{reviewTime}, archive_time = #{archiveTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime},
where issue_id = #{issueId} and del_flag = '0'
and issue_status = #{expectedStatus}
mapper.insert: insert into nc_rectification_log (issue_id, from_status, to_status, action_name, handle_by, handle_time, handle_opinion, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{issueId}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{actionName}, #{handleBy}, #{handleTime}, #{handleOpinion}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select log_id, issue_id, from_status, to_status, action_name, handle_by, handle_time, handle_opinion, create_by, create_time, remark from nc_rectification_log where issue_id = #{issueId} order by handle_time, log_id
select r.issue_status as stat_name, count(1) as count_value from nc_rectification_issue r where r.del_flag = '0' ${params.dataScope} group by r.issue_status order by r.issue_status

select coalesce(r.region_name, '未填地区') as stat_name, count(1) as count_value from nc_rectification_issue r where r.del_flag = '0' ${params.dataScope} group by coalesce(r.region_name, '未填地区') order by count(1) desc
